text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Amir Irani called U.S. President Trump's threats laughable and said that the Navy is monitoring all of the U.S.'s naval movements in the area. "The brave men of the Navy of the Islamic Republic of Iran Army monitor and keep under observation all movements of the invading US army in the region. The threats of the US president after the humiliating defeat of his country's army in the Third Imposed War regarding the naval blockade of Iran are very ridiculous and laughable." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令阿米尔·伊拉尼称特朗普总统的威胁是可笑的，并表示海军正在监视美国在该地区的所有海军动向。“伊朗伊斯兰共和国军队海军的勇士们监视并观察着入侵的美国军队在该地区的所有动向。在美国军队在第三次强加战争中惨败后，美国总统关于对伊朗实施海军封锁的威胁是非常荒谬和可笑的。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺With nearly 30% of the votes counted, Peter Magyar’s Tisza Party is leading ahead of Orbán. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics" 🇭🇺 After 37% of the votes have been counted, Peter Magyar’s Tisza Party is one seat away from securing a supermajority in parliament. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇭🇺 随着近30%的选票统计完毕，彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）的蒂萨党（Tisza Party）领先于欧尔班。🔴 @DDGeopolitics” 🇭🇺 在37%的选票统计完毕后，彼得·马扎尔的蒂萨党距离在议会获得绝对多数席位仅差一席。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan: Pakistan, the main mediator in US‑Iran talks, is disappointed by the failure but not giving up. A Pakistani government source said efforts continue to arrange another round of talks, while also trying to extend the current two‑week ceasefire beyond its term. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：作为美伊谈判主要调解人的巴基斯坦对谈判失败感到失望，但并未放弃。巴基斯坦政府消息人士称，各方仍在努力安排新一轮谈判，同时试图延长目前为期两周的停火协议。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam said the south has suffered for years from "occupation, attacks and displacement," paying the price of the state’s absence. “The defence of the south and all of Lebanon will only be achieved through a united and strong state,” he said. He added that efforts continue to stop the war, secure an Israeli withdrawal, release prisoners, rebuild villages and allow displaced residents to return. “Our unity today is not just a sentimental slogan – it is a national necessity.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆（Nawaf Salam）表示，南部多年来饱受“占领、袭击和流离失所”之苦，付出了国家缺位的代价。“南部乃至整个黎巴嫩的防御，只有通过一个团结而强大的国家才能实现，”他说。他补充说，各方仍在努力停止战争、确保以色列撤军、释放囚犯、重建村庄并让流离失所的居民返回。“我们今天的团结不仅仅是一个感性的口号，它是国家的必然要求。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian president Pezeshkian says if the U.S. abandons its totalitarianism, an agreement will be reached. If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found. I commend the members of the negotiating team, especially my dear brother Mr. Dr. Qalibaf, and say "God gives you strength." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬表示，如果美国放弃其极权主义，就能达成协议。如果美国政府放弃其极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，就一定能找到达成协议的方法。我赞扬谈判小组成员，特别是我的亲爱的兄弟卡利巴夫博士（Dr. Qalibaf），并说“上帝赐予你们力量”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah released footage of a strike against an Israeli position in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了针对黎巴嫩南部一处以色列阵地进行打击的视频。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 The advisory committee for senior appointments has approved the candidacy of Major General Roman Gofman as head of the Mossad. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu signed the appointment letter. Gofman will take office on 2 June 2026 for a five‑year term…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu announced the appointment of Major General Roman Gofman as the next director of the Mossad, following approval by the Grunis Committee. Gofman has served as Netanyahu’s military secretary for the past two years. “He is an outstanding, bold and creative officer, who throughout the war demonstrated out‑of‑the‑box thinking and impressive resourcefulness,” Netanyahu said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱 高级任命咨询委员会已批准罗曼·戈夫曼（Roman Gofman）少将担任摩萨德负责人的候选资格。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡签署了任命书。戈夫曼将于2026年6月2日上任，任期五年……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡宣布任命罗曼·戈夫曼少将为下一任摩萨德局长，此前该任命已获得格鲁尼斯委员会（Grunis Committee）的批准。戈夫曼在过去两年一直担任内塔尼亚胡的军事秘书。“他是一位杰出、大胆且富有创造力的军官，在整个战争期间展现了打破常规的思维和令人印象深刻的足智多谋，”内塔尼亚胡说。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor He doesn’t care anymore. Trump is putting his ego ahead of affordability for Americans. I’m confused If Trump now blockades Strait of Hormuz that will mean LESS oil and gas on global market which means WORSE global economic crisis What am I missing? - Tom London tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：他不在乎了。特朗普把自己的自负置于美国人的负担能力之上。我很困惑，如果特朗普现在封锁霍尔木兹海峡，那将意味着全球市场上的石油和天然气减少，这意味着更严重的全球经济危机。我错过了什么？ - Tom London 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : According to CNN, citing people familiar with intelligence assessments on the matter, China is preparing to send air defense systems to Iran in the coming weeks. Per the report, China is preparing to send Man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) through a third party to mask the origin of the weapons. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：转发 @sentdefender：据美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）援引熟悉相关情报评估的人士的话称，中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗运送防空系统。据报道，中国正准备通过第三方运送便携式防空系统（MANPADS），以掩盖武器来源。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @aliasvaughn : @TheWarMonitor There is none. The strait is closed. It’s just a way for him to claim he blocked it when in fact it was already blocked tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：转发 @aliasvaughn：@TheWarMonitor 没有什么可说的。海峡已经关闭了。这只是他声称自己封锁了海峡的一种方式，而实际上它已经被封锁了。推文

text: WarMonitor Kim Jong Un called Trump a “mentally deranged dotard.” Trump on Kim Jong Un: “Do you notice he said very nice things about me? He used to call Joe Biden a mentally retarded person... He was so nasty to Joe Biden. It was terrible. But to me, he likes Trump” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2043124164215656777/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) ? JD Vance: Iran said, 'We refuse to give up the right to enrichment.' And I thought to myself, you know what, my wife has the right to skydive, but she doesn't jump out of an airplane. Because she and I have an agreement that she's not going to do that, because I don't want my wife jumping out of an airplane. - unusual_whales tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：JD·万斯：伊朗说，“我们拒绝放弃浓缩铀的权利。” 我心想，你知道吗，我妻子有跳伞的权利，但她不会从飞机上跳下去。因为我和她有一个协议，她不会那样做，因为我不希望我妻子从飞机上跳下去。 - unusual_whales 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Fox News, citing two U.S. officials, Vice President JD Vance’s final offer delivered to the Iranian delegation in Islamabad last night, prior to the breakdown of peace talks between the two countries mediated by Pakistan, consisted of the following demands: 1. End all uranium enrichment 2. Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities 3. Retrieve highly enriched uranium 4. Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies 5. End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis 6. Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据福克斯新闻援引两名美国官员的话称，副总统JD·万斯昨晚在伊斯兰堡向伊朗代表团提交的最终提议，在巴基斯坦调解的两国和平谈判破裂之前，包含以下要求：1. 停止所有铀浓缩；2. 拆除所有主要核浓缩设施；3. 收回高浓缩铀；4. 接受包括地区盟友在内的更广泛的和平、安全和局势缓和框架；5. 停止资助哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装等恐怖代理人；6. 完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取任何费用。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ With 6.56% of votes counted so far: 🔵 Tisza — 110 seats (39 proportional, 71 majoritarian) 🔴 Fidesz — 71 seats (45 proportional, 26 majoritarian) ⚪ Mi Hazánk — 9 seats (9 proportional, 0 majoritarian) See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043396037696479375/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese PM Nawaf Salam called for unity and warned against another civil war in a speech marking 51 years since the Lebanese civil war, as Beirut prepares to engage Israel in direct negotiations in Washington this week. Salam admitted Lebanon has failed since 1991 to implement the Taif Agreement, which calls for extending state authority over all territories and a monopoly on bearing arms. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆在纪念黎巴嫩内战爆发51周年的演讲中呼吁团结，并警告不要发生另一次内战，此时贝鲁特正准备本周在华盛顿与以色列进行直接谈判。萨拉姆承认，自1991年以来，黎巴嫩未能实施《塔伊夫协议》，该协议要求将国家权力扩展到所有领土并垄断武器持有权。推文

text_zh: WarMonitor：英国否认了这一点。特朗普称北约现在想在霍尔木兹海峡问题上提供帮助。 - Faytuks Network 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇬🇧 🇷🇺 A former police officer has become the first British citizen to be stripped of citizenship on national security grounds over alleged ties to Russia, according to the Mirror. ▪️ Mark Bullen, 45, who served for over a decade with Hertfordshire Constabulary, was stopped at Luton Airport in 2024 and questioned over suspected involvement in hostile activity linked to a foreign state. ▪️ He had a long-standing fascination with Russia, where he now resides, and had his electronic devices seized after traveling to the UK. ▪️ Bullen obtained a Russian passport in 2022, calling it a “lifelong dream,” and was stripped of his British citizenship in October 2025 by Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner：转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇬🇧 🇷🇺 据《镜报》报道，一名英国前警官因涉嫌与俄罗斯有联系，成为首位以国家安全为由被剥夺公民身份的英国公民。▪️ 45岁的马克·布伦（Mark Bullen）曾在赫特福德郡警察局服役十多年，2024年在卢顿机场被拦截，并因涉嫌参与与外国有关的敌对活动而受到讯问。▪️ 他长期迷恋俄罗斯，目前居住在那里，在前往英国后，他的电子设备被没收。▪️ 布伦在2022年获得了俄罗斯护照，称这是“终生的梦想”，并于2025年10月被内政大臣沙巴娜·马哈茂德（Shabana Mahmood）剥夺了英国公民身份。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Early list vote results with 2.86% counted show Fidesz–KDNP leading with 48.18% and 45 mandates, followed by TISZA with 43.38% and 39 mandates. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 With 6.52% reporting, Tisza now leads list voting with 84,303 votes compared to Fidesz 77,014. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 早期名单投票结果显示，在已统计2.86%的情况下，青民盟-基民党（Fidesz–KDNP）以48.18%的得票率和45个席位领先，其次是蒂萨党（TISZA），得票率为43.38%，获得39个席位。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 在6.52%的选票报告中，蒂萨党目前在名单投票中以84,303票领先，青民盟为77,014票。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Early list vote results with 2.86% counted show Fidesz–KDNP leading with 48.18% and 45 mandates, followed by TISZA with 43.38% and 39 mandates. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 With 14.72% of mandates counted TISZA is leading with 125 total seats, including 89 constituency wins and 36 list seats. Fidesz–KDNP holds 65 seats, with 16 constituency wins and 49 list seats. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 早期名单投票结果显示，在已统计2.86%的情况下，青民盟-基民党以48.18%的得票率和45个席位领先，其次是蒂萨党，得票率为43.38%，获得39个席位。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 在已统计14.72%的席位中，蒂萨党以总计125个席位领先，包括89个选区获胜和36个名单席位。青民盟-基民党持有65个席位，包括16个选区获胜和49个名单席位。@wfwitness

text: The UK will not join the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 英国不会加入美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。

text: 📝 🇸🇦 🇮🇱 "And now, somewhere in Riyadh, the Crown Prince is staring at a charred THAAD radar, a half-empty interceptor magazine, and a $142 billion receipt, and he is doing the math Rubio did on television: 100 missiles a month versus six or seven interceptors. And he is realizing, perhaps for the first time, that the Abraham Accords were not a security guarantee. They were a customer acquisition strategy." https://themiccheck.substack.com/p/the-abraham-accords-a-hilarious-grift
text_zh: 📝 🇸🇦 🇮🇱 “现在，在利雅得的某个地方，王储正盯着一个烧焦的萨德（THAAD）雷达、一个半空的拦截弹弹匣和一张1420亿美元的收据，他正在做卢比奥在电视上做的数学题：每月100枚导弹对阵六七枚拦截弹。他或许第一次意识到，亚伯拉罕协议并不是安全保障。它们是一种客户获取策略。” https://themiccheck.substack.com/p/the-abraham-accords-a-hilarious-grift

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Vote counting has officially begun for the Hungarian parliamentary elections. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Early list vote results with 2.86% counted show Fidesz–KDNP leading with 48.18% and 45 mandates, followed by TISZA with 43.38% and 39 mandates. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举的计票工作已正式开始。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 早期名单投票结果显示，在已统计2.86%的情况下，青民盟-基民党以48.18%的得票率和45个席位领先，其次是蒂萨党，得票率为43.38%，获得39个席位。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Polls have closed in Hungary’s parliamentary election, with turnout at 77.8% as of 18:30 local time, significantly higher than the 67.8% recorded in the 2022 vote. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Vote counting has officially begun for the Hungarian parliamentary elections. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举投票结束，截至当地时间18:30，投票率为77.8%，明显高于2022年投票时记录的67.8%。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举的计票工作已正式开始。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱 The appointment of Roman Gofman, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s military secretary, as the next head of the Mossad has been postponed after the Senior Appointments Committee failed to reach unanimous approval. While a majority of committee…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The advisory committee for senior appointments has approved the candidacy of Major General Roman Gofman as head of the Mossad. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu signed the appointment letter. Gofman will take office on 2 June 2026 for a five‑year term replacing the current Mossad head David Barnea. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡的军事秘书罗曼·戈夫曼被任命为下一任摩萨德局长，但在高级任命委员会未能达成一致批准后，该任命已被推迟。虽然委员会多数……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 高级任命咨询委员会已批准罗曼·戈夫曼少将担任摩萨德负责人的候选资格。以色列总理内塔尼亚胡签署了任命书。戈夫曼将于2026年6月2日上任，任期五年，接替现任摩萨德局长大卫·巴尔内亚（David Barnea）。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu visited southern Lebanon with the Israeli defense minister Israel Katz and IDF chief of staff Eyal Zamir, stating that “the war continues, including inside the security zone in Lebanon.” He said Israel has thwarted…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Against the backdrop of heightened tensions, the Israeli government is expected to convene on Monday to extend the “special situation on the home front” until the end of the month. Meanwhile, the Israeli Home Front Command is expected to announce significant restrictions for Independence Day celebrations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡与以色列国防部长以色列·卡茨（Israel Katz）和以色列国防军参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）访问了黎巴嫩南部，称“战争仍在继续，包括在黎巴嫩境内的安全区内。” 他说以色列已经挫败了……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在紧张局势加剧的背景下，以色列政府预计将于周一召开会议，将“后方特殊情况”延长至本月底。与此同时，以色列后方司令部预计将宣布对独立日庆祝活动实施重大限制。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 IRNA: The high-ranking Iranian delegation, headed by Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, left Islamabad for Tehran hours ago. Pakistani officials, including the deputy prime minister, National Assembly speaker…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, Returning from talks in Islamabad, said the U.S. must decide whether it is ready to earn Iran’s trust. “Our wall of distrust is 77 years old, and in less than a year they attacked us twice during negotiations,” he said. He thanked the Iranian people for their street presence, which he said helped defend Iran’s rights. The Iranian delegation – named “Minab 168” – worked for over 20 hours. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：由议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫和外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐率领的高级伊朗代表团几小时前离开伊斯兰堡前往德黑兰。包括副总理、国民议会议长在内的巴基斯坦官员……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫在从伊斯兰堡会谈返回后表示，美国必须决定是否准备好赢得伊朗的信任。“我们的不信任之墙已经77年了，在不到一年的时间里，他们在谈判期间两次袭击了我们，”他说。他感谢伊朗人民在街头的表现，称这有助于捍卫伊朗的权利。伊朗代表团——名为“Minab 168”——工作了超过20个小时。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇳🇬 At least 200 people are feared dead after a Nigerian airstrike hit a village market in Yobe state during an operation targeting militants, according to local officials and residents. The strike reportedly occurred near Jilli Market along the Yobe–Borno border, with casualties taken to nearby hospitals. The military says it targeted militants and has not confirmed striking the market. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇳🇬 据当地官员和居民称，尼日利亚的一次空袭在针对武装分子的行动中击中了约贝州的一个乡村市场，造成至少200人死亡。据报道，袭击发生在约贝州与博尔诺州边界的吉利市场（Jilli Market）附近，伤者已被送往附近医院。军方称其目标是武装分子，并未证实袭击了市场。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: If the Americans test our will again, we will give them an even bigger lesson.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：如果美国人再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Threats have no effect on the Iranian nation. We have proven that this is not a slogan—the world has seen it with its own eyes. We have shown that the enemy has reached a state of desperation. We have proven that we do not surrender under threats. Over 47 years of the revolution, in military arenas, economic sanctions, political pressure, and more, the Iranian people have demonstrated this in practice.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：威胁对伊朗民族没有影响。我们已经证明这不是一个口号——全世界都亲眼看到了。我们已经表明敌人已经陷入绝望状态。我们已经证明我们不会在威胁下投降。在革命的47年里，在军事领域、经济制裁、政治压力等方面，伊朗人民已经在实践中证明了这一点。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: If the United States wants to find a way out, the only path is to decide to earn the trust of the Iranian people. You are indebted to the Iranian nation and still have much to do to make amends. If you choose war, we will fight; if you come with logic, we will respond with logic. We will not submit to any threats. If they test our will again, we will give them a greater lesson.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：如果美国想找到出路，唯一的途径就是决定赢得伊朗人民的信任。你们欠伊朗民族的债，还有很多事情要做来弥补。如果你们选择战争，我们将战斗；如果你们带着逻辑来，我们将以逻辑回应。我们不会屈服于任何威胁。如果他们再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: 🇺🇸 Watch the awkward moment when Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch forgets her lines (or her earpiece cuts out) and she just stands there looking awkward. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 观看阿耳忒弥斯2号（Artemis II）宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫（Christina Koch）忘记台词（或耳机断开）的尴尬时刻，她只是站在那里看起来很尴尬。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The UK will not join the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 英国不会加入美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。

text: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 BREAKING: The UK says it will not take part in U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz Trump claimed earlier today that ‘the UK will send warships to help, and probably other countries will too’. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 突发新闻：英国表示不会参与美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。特朗普今天早些时候声称“英国将派遣军舰提供帮助，其他国家可能也会这样做”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Chairman of Knesset National Security Committee Tzvika Foghel mocks Trump: Donald, if you have to shoot, shoot. Don’t quack 🦆
text_zh: 以色列议会国家安全委员会主席茨维卡·福格尔（Tzvika Foghel）嘲笑特朗普：唐纳德，如果你必须开枪，就开枪。别只会呱呱叫 🦆

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Sky News: A British government spokesperson says that Britain will not participate in the U.S.’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. “We continue to support freedom of navigation and the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, which is urgently needed to support the global economy and the cost of living back home. The Strait of Hormuz must not be subject to tolling. We are urgently working with France and other partners to put together a wide coalition to protect freedom of navigation." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 天空新闻（Sky News）：英国政府发言人表示，英国不会参与美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。“我们继续支持航行自由和霍尔木兹海峡的开放，这对于支持全球经济和国内生活成本至关重要。霍尔木兹海峡不得被征收通行费。我们正在与法国和其他伙伴紧急合作，建立一个广泛的联盟来保护航行自由。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 i24NEWS: A senior U.S. official said gaps between Washington and Tehran remain enormous, with no progress on uranium enrichment, dismantling nuclear facilities, removing enriched uranium from Iran, releasing frozen assets, halting proxy funding, or opening the Strait of Hormuz. No further talks have been scheduled. U.S. President Trump has decided to impose a naval blockade on Iran. Israel was updated in advance and welcomes the hard line. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 i24NEWS：一位美国高级官员表示，华盛顿和德黑兰之间的分歧仍然巨大，在铀浓缩、拆除核设施、从伊朗运出浓缩铀、释放冻结资产、停止代理人资助或开放霍尔木兹海峡方面没有任何进展。目前没有安排进一步的会谈。特朗普总统已决定对伊朗实施海军封锁。以色列已提前获悉并欢迎这一强硬路线。 @wfwitness
